name: zoho-mail-health
description: Daily Zoho Mail health check — verifies both MSApps accounts are reachable, reads recent inbox messages, sends test emails, and produces a status report.

sosa.supervised: MCP tool calls require user approval for send operations. Read operations are autonomous.
sosa.orchestrated: R=zoho-mail-health-check. T=zohomail MCP tools + Python fallback. M=none. P=check-auth → list-messages → test-send → report.
sosa.secured: No hardcoded credentials. Uses env vars for OAuth tokens. Credential references use placeholders.
sosa.agents: R=mail-health-checker, T=zohomail_* MCP tools, M=none, P=sequential-health-check
